svg.title: Marketing Subsystem – Team Work Division
svg.desc: Three-person team breakdown for the Marketing ERP subsystem in Java Swing

g.text: Acts as base for teammates to build on
Builds on Member 1's DB layer and campaign entities
Builds on Member 1's campaign data and Member 2's email/lead data
All 14 exceptions from MarketingExceptions.pdf implemented across the 3 members' modules.
Each member handles exceptions relevant to their own functionality.
